case_title: LOTTON APRIL DENISE VS SECHAN NEIL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SECHAN NEIL
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SECHAN NEIL
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO JILL ANDERSON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $625.00 FILED BY LOTTON APRIL DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT SECHAN NEIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOTTON APRIL DENISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SECHAN NEIL $425.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $453.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ANDERSEN JULIE SERVED ON 03/14/91.
PLTFF CLAIMS THAT JULIE ANDERSEN SERVED ON 3/14/91 IS JILL ANDERSON AS FILED IN SC 29 FORM 3/14/91.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 20868, RECORD TRANSFERRED
